title: [Cobblemon] Pidove Variants
description: A small Cobblemon add-on that adds Pidove variants.
body:
A small add-on that adds four extra variants of Pidove.

![All Pidove variants. From left to right, an auburn, lahore, shiny, modena, icy, and standard Pidove sit.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/EetmS8RD/images/d47ad557774a30707a17af9c35fe27ae99dccf69_350.webp)

Currently, no variant Pidove can be shiny (shinyness takes priority over variant color), and the variant feather colors do not apply to Tranquill or Unfezant.
